intent: In DATA_DIR there is a 10x matrix triplet for one PBMC sample — files prefixed GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1. Run a standard Seurat workflow in R: load, QC, normalize, PCA, neighbors, clustering, UMAP, and FindAllMarkers; show me a UMAP and the top markers per cluster.

blocks.text: Good — I see the 10x triplets. You have three samples, but you asked for GSM5746268 (the first one). Now let me load the Seurat recipe to review the standard workflow:

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "seurat-scrna", "description": "Authoritative single-cell RNA-seq QC + clustering + cluster annotation with R/Seurat (v5).", "body": "scRNA-seq QC + clustering + annotation with R/Seurat v5 (standard PBMC3k workflow). Provision: ensure_capability('Seurat'), then library(Seurat). THE THREE CHOICES THAT DEFINE THE RESULT \u2014 surface them with present_plan before committing: (1) QC thresholds (subset cutoffs on nFeature_RNA and percent.mt); (2) number of PCs/dims (read off the ElbowPlot); (3) clustering resolution (FindClusters). Steps: ReadMtx -> CreateSeuratObject(min.cells=3,min.features=200) -> PercentageFeatureSet('^MT-') -> subset QC -> NormalizeData -> FindVariableFeatures -> ScaleData -> RunPCA -> FindNeighbors -> FindClusters -> RunUMAP -> JoinLayers -> FindAllMarkers. Load ggplot2 and dplyr explicitly; never library(tidyverse)."}

blocks.text: Perfect. Now let me present the plan for the Seurat workflow on GSM5746268:

input.title: Seurat scRNA-seq workflow for GSM5746268
input.summary: Load 10x triplet (GSM5746268), run full Seurat v5 pipeline (QC, normalization, clustering, UMAP), and report top markers per cluster.

steps.title: Load 10x MTX triplet and create Seurat object
steps.description: Read barcodes, features, and matrix.mtx for GSM5746268; create Seurat object with standard min.cells=3, min.features=200.

steps.title: QC: add mitochondrial & ribosomal percentages
steps.description: Compute percent.mt for genes matching ^MT-, and percent.ribo for ^RP[SL].
expected_outputs: summary stats on nFeature, nCount, percent.mt, percent.ribo

steps.title: QC filtering
steps.description: Subset on nFeature_RNA (200–7000), percent.mt (<20%), and percent.ribo (<50%) to remove low-quality cells and doublets.

steps.title: FindAllMarkers
steps.description: Run FindAllMarkers to identify DE genes per cluster (Wilcox, logfc.threshold=0.25, min.pct=0.1).

steps.title: Visualize: UMAP and top markers table
steps.description: Plot UMAP colored by cluster, and table of top 5 markers per cluster.

assumptions: Using GSM5746268_MGI0369_1_SLAB-C1-C1 (first sample only, as requested)
Standard Seurat v5 workflow with default parameters and sensible QC cutoffs
